subject: [PATCH 1/8] mm/khugepaged: refactor per-scan state clearing into collapse_control_init_scan()

reviews.author: Nico Pache
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the order of folio_maybe_mapped_shared() and !folio_test_anon() checks was flipped, which could result in different collapse even counters being incremented, despite the commit message stating no other functional changes were intended.
reviews.raw_body:
Good catch, I didn't realize i reordered it.

It might make even more sense to move it to right after we get the
folio. All other checks are pointless are we somehow landed on a
!(anon) page.

Does that sound better?

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch refactors the PTE state checks in the mm/khugepaged code into a helper function to improve maintainability and reduce duplication of logic.
